name: context-handoff
description: Context window monitoring and session handoff for Copilot CLI -- a session extension that tracks token utilization via session.usage_info and nudges toward a continuation prompt before auto-compaction, plus the /handoff skill that composes the handoff and (sitting on top of agent-dispatch) stores it as a claimable, worktree-pinned task when a coordinator is present -- else a session file -- and /resume-handoff to consume that task in a fresh foreground session
